title: Dangote Refinery Commends Tinubu, Security Chiefs, Ministers for Averting PENGASSAN Disruption …Reaffirms Commitment to Nigeria’s Progress, Workers’ Welfare - FinancialEDGE
description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery has expressed profound appreciation to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for his timely intervention in averting what it described as “the disruptive actions of PENGASSAN” against the company. The company in a statement said the President’s leadership, through his ministers and senior government officials, ensured the restoration of order and stability to the
html: Dangote Petroleum Refinery has expressed profound appreciation to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for his timely intervention in averting what it described as “the disruptive actions of PENGASSAN” against the company.
